item.name: Sweeper
item.description:
Its habit of moving its head from side to side while searching the seabed for food has earned it this unusual moniker.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Unlike its close cousin, the ferocious hammerhead, this particular species is content to forgo larger prey in favor of scouring the ocean floor for smaller morsels. Given the methodical manner in which it feeds, many believe it is merely trying to keep its habitat free from detritus.
